title: FP&A Analyst
description: Join PepsiCo's Finance, Planning & Analysis team to drive strategic decision-making through financial modeling and analysis. You'll work on forecasting, budgeting, and performance tracking.
responsibilities: Develop and maintain financial models for strategic planning and forecasting
Analyze actual performance against budget and identify variances
Support business unit leaders with financial analysis and recommendations
Prepare management reporting packages and executive dashboards
Collaborate on annual budgeting and strategic planning cycles
Conduct ad-hoc financial analysis to support business decisions

requirements.education: High school diploma or equivalent; relevant degree or certification strongly preferred

benefits: Flexible time off and work arrangements
